en: Now Sarai, Abram's wife, had borne him no children. She had a female Egyptian servant whose name was Hagar.
zh: 亞伯蘭的妻子撒萊，沒有為他生孩子。撒萊卻有一個婢女，是埃及人，名叫夏甲。

en: And Sarai said to Abram, "Behold now, the LORD has prevented me from bearing children. Go in to my servant; it may be that I shall obtain children by her." And Abram listened to the voice of Sarai.
zh: 撒萊對亞伯蘭說：“請看，耶和華使我不能生育，求你去親近我的婢女，或者我可以從她得孩子。”亞伯蘭就聽從了撒萊的話。

en: So, after Abram had lived ten years in the land of Canaan, Sarai, Abram's wife, took Hagar the Egyptian, her servant, and gave her to Abram her husband as a wife.
zh: 亞伯蘭在迦南地住滿了十年，他的妻子撒萊，把自己的婢女埃及人夏甲，給了她的丈夫亞伯蘭為妾。

en: And he went in to Hagar, and she conceived. And when she saw that she had conceived, she looked with contempt on her mistress.
zh: 亞伯蘭與夏甲親近，夏甲就懷了孕。夏甲見自己有了孕，就輕看她的主母。

en: And Sarai said to Abram, "May the wrong done to me be on you! I gave my servant to your embrace, and when she saw that she had conceived, she looked on me with contempt. May the LORD judge between you and me!"
zh: 撒萊對亞伯蘭說：“我因你受屈；我把我的婢女送到你的懷中，她見自己有了孕，就輕看我。願耶和華在你我之間主持公道。”

en: But Abram said to Sarai, "Behold, your servant is in your power; do to her as you please." Then Sarai dealt harshly with her, and she fled from her.
zh: 亞伯蘭對撒萊說：“你的婢女在你手中，你看怎樣好，就怎樣待她吧。”於是撒萊虐待夏甲，她就從撒萊面前逃走了。

en: The angel of the LORD found her by a spring of water in the wilderness, the spring on the way to Shur.
zh: 耶和華的使者在曠野的水泉旁邊，就是在到書珥路上的水旁邊，遇到了她，

en: And he said, "Hagar, servant of Sarai, where have you come from and where are you going?" She said, "I am fleeing from my mistress Sarai."
zh: 就問她：“撒萊的婢女夏甲啊，你從哪裡來？要到哪裡去？”夏甲回答：“我從我的主母撒萊面前逃出來。”

en: The angel of the LORD said to her, "Return to your mistress and submit to her."
zh: 耶和華的使者對她說：“回到你主母那裡去，服在她的手下！”

en: The angel of the LORD also said to her, "I will surely multiply your offspring so that they cannot be numbered for multitude."
zh: 耶和華的使者又對她說：“我必使你的後裔人丁興旺，多到不可勝數。”

en: And the angel of the LORD said to her, "Behold, you are pregnant and shall bear a son. You shall call his name Ishmael, because the LORD has listened to your affliction.
zh: 耶和華的使者再對她說： “看哪，你已經懷了孕， 你要生一個兒子； 你要給他起名叫以實瑪利， 因為耶和華聽見了你的苦情。

en: He shall be a wild donkey of a man, his hand against everyone and everyone's hand against him, and he shall dwell over against all his kinsmen."
zh: 他將來為人， 必像野驢。 他的手要攻打人， 人的手也要攻打他。 他必住在眾兄弟的東面。”

en: So she called the name of the LORD who spoke to her, "You are a God of seeing," for she said, "Truly here I have seen him who looks after me."
zh: 於是，夏甲給那對她說話的耶和華，起名叫“你是看顧人的 神”，因為她說：“在這裡我不是也看見了那位看顧人的嗎？”

en: Therefore the well was called Beer-lahai-roi; it lies between Kadesh and Bered.
zh: 因此，這井名叫庇耳．拉海．萊，是在加低斯和巴列之間。

en: And Hagar bore Abram a son, and Abram called the name of his son, whom Hagar bore, Ishmael.
zh: 夏甲給亞伯蘭生了一個兒子，亞伯蘭就給夏甲所生的兒子，起名叫以實瑪利。

en: Abram was eighty-six years old when Hagar bore Ishmael to Abram.
zh: 亞伯蘭八十六歲的時候，夏甲給他生了以實瑪利。
